description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job called custard in the test stage. The job runs the following script commands: mkdir -p .logs; echo 'x11-wm/custard test.conf' > /etc/portage/package.env/custard; mkdir -p /etc/portage/package.accept_keywords; echo '=x11-wm/custard-9999 **' > /etc/portage/package.accept_keywords/custard; mkdir -p /etc/portage/package.use/x11-wm; mkdir -p /etc/portage/package.use/x11-libs; echo 'x11-libs/libxcb xkb' > /etc/portage/package.use/x11-libs/libxcb; echo 'x11-wm/custard examples doc' > /etc/portage/package.use/x11-wm/custard; env ACCEPT_KEYWORDS="~*" MAKEOPTS="-j$(($(nproc)+1))" emerge -v --usepkg y --buildpkg y x11-wm/custard::ahrs; rm -rf /usr/portage/packages/x11-wm/custard/*.tbz2. After the script, the after_script moves any /var/log/emerge.log, /var/log/emerge-fetch.log, or /var/log/emerge directory into a .logs folder. The .logs directory is uploaded as an artifact. The job only runs when the commit message matches the regex $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE =~ /x11-wm\/custard/.
